<svelte:options runes={true} />

let text = $state('');

let wordCount = $derived.by(() => {
  const trimmed = text.trim();
  if (trimmed === '') return 0;
  return trimmed.split(/\s+/).length;
});

let charCount = $derived.by(() => {
  return text.length;
});

let lengthIndicator = $derived.by(() => {
  return wordCount > 15 ? 'Long text' : 'Short text';
});

function clearText() {
  text = '';
}
